title: Check a Door Is Locked
summary: Verify that doors and windows are properly locked before leaving home or going to sleep.
learnerPromise: You will be able to quickly and reliably check that your doors and windows are locked, giving you confidence that your home is secure.
whyItMatters: An unlocked door or window is one of the most common ways someone can enter a home without permission. A simple check takes seconds and greatly improves security.
realLifeUses: Lock up before leaving home for school or work
Secure the house before going to bed at night
Check that a roommate or visitor remembered to lock the door behind them
Verify windows are locked after airing out a room
result: All exterior doors and accessible windows are confirmed locked.
youWillLearn: Check a door lock by physically testing the handle and bolt
Check window locks by trying to slide or open each window
Create a quick routine that covers every entry point
Notice when a lock is not working properly and needs repair
miniChallenge: Walk to your front door right now, check that it is locked, and test the lock by turning the handle without unlocking it.
steps: Start at the main entry door and turn the handle to confirm the bolt or latch is holding
Check the deadbolt or secondary lock by trying to slide it or verifying it is engaged
Move to any other exterior doors and repeat the handle and lock check
Walk to each ground-floor or accessible window and confirm the lock is closed
If you are leaving, take your keys and do one final check of the door you exit through
completionCriteria: You physically verify that every exterior door and window is locked
You notice and note any lock that feels loose or does not catch properly
commonProblems: Doors can feel locked when the latch is not fully engaged
Sliding windows may appear closed but the lock is not clicked in
Rushing makes it easy to skip a door or assume someone else locked it
tips: Do the same route every time so it becomes automatic
If you live with others, agree on who locks up for different times of day
A sticky or loose lock is a maintenance issue—report it early
Before bed, also check that any pet doors or basement access points are secure
